initializeCommand.preflight-git-installed: git --version > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ git found on host' || echo '⚠️  git not found on host'
initializeCommand.preflight-git-identity: git config user.name > /dev/null 2>&1 && git config user.email > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo '✅ git identity configured' || echo '⚠️  git identity not set — run: git config --global user.name "Name" && git config --global user.email "you@example.com"'
initializeCommand.preflight-no-secrets: ! git ls-files | grep -qiE '(\.env$|\.env\.|secrets|credentials)' && echo '✅ no secret files tracked' || echo '⚠️  possible secret files detected in git — review before pushing'

postCreateCommand.postflight-r-version: R --version | head -1 && echo '✅ R is available'

postAttachCommand.welcome:
printf '
┌─────────────────────────────────────────┐
│   welcome to the R dev container  🧪    │
│   hack well, commit often, stay tidy   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────┘

' && echo '--- recent commits ---' && git log --oneline -10 && echo ''
